changes: Wind bus target lowered for cloudy/rain/storm and target cap reduced.
Bird bus target raised and per-chirp gain multiplier added while preserving V196 sparse scheduler and six variants.
Footstep bus and per-step transient raised considerably while preserving V196 slow cadence.
Rain volume unchanged from V196 by this patch.
expected_manual_test: perlaFootstepsOn(); walk on road/sand/grass for louder footsteps
